segments.text: Cottage cheese or curd cheese (cream cheese) - 300 g
Can be replaced with butter or cocoa butter! 
If there are lumps left, you can use a blender!
Put in the freezer for 3 hours
Melt in the microwave or in a water bath
Place in the refrigerator for 1 hour to defrost the filling.

fullText: Cottage cheese or curd cheese (cream cheese) - 300 g Coconut oil - 40 g Can be replaced with butter or cocoa butter!  Honey - 40 g Cocoa - 20 g Vanilla extract - 1 tsp If there are lumps left, you can use a blender! Put in the freezer for 3 hours Peanuts - 40 g Dark chocolate - 160 g Melt in the microwave or in a water bath Place in the refrigerator for 1 hour to defrost the filling.
